title: Implement SimRadio client
description: Create python/src/lichen/radio/sim_client.py. SimRadio class implementing Radio protocol. __init__(host, port, sim_id, node_id, position). async connect(): open TCP, send REGISTER, await OK. async transmit(payload) -> bool: send TX, await TX_DONE/TX_FAIL. async receive(timeout_ms) -> tuple | None: send RX, await RX_OK/RX_TIMEOUT. async get_time() -> int: send TIME, await TIME_OK. async close(): close TCP connection. Context manager support (__aenter__, __aexit__). Reconnection logic on disconnect. Unit tests using mock TCP server.
close_reason: Wave 3 complete. 241 tests pass, ruff clean.
